data.body:
4214 completion-verifier FAILED (3 genuine test-coverage gaps; impl present, tests absent). Must add to #664 as PS8:
(1) merged_log_commit: test off-history commit fails closed + plaintext material/merged_log_commit mutation (envelope untouched) leaves verdict unchanged both directions.
(2) rollback sub-cases missing: (a) revoked-after-anchor/at-or-before-pin PASSES; (b) revoked key NO grandfather pin FAILS all certs; (c) unresolvable storage anchor fails closed.
(3) rebar trusted-env add|revoke stamps current tickets tip (add->added_at_log_position, revoke->revoked_at_log_position).
SEQUENCING: 8d8e implementer editing shared worktree on work-8d8e (stacked on #664). Plan: finish+validate 8d8e edits -> add 4214 tests on work-4214 -> amend #664 PS8 -> rebase work-8d8e onto it -> push PS8, close 4214 after Verified+1 -> then 8d8e. NOTE: #664 PS7 was LLM-Review+MAX & Verified+MAX; PS8 (tests-only) re-triggers both.
